driver_subject: scsi: tcm_loop: Use scsi_cmd_to_rq() instead of scsi_cmnd.request
kernel_subject: scsi: core: Introduce the scsi_cmd_to_rq() function
stage1_reason: Two of three commits explicitly adapt to kernel API changes: cb22f89e7a12 replaces scsi_cmnd.request with scsi_cmd_to_rq() for request pointer removal preparation, and fc7a6209d571 changes remove callback return type from int to void per bus API update. The diff shows corresponding changes to function signatures and scsi_cmd_to_rq() usage.
stage2_reason: Driver commit cb22f89e7a12 adapts to kernel API change by replacing scsi_cmnd.request with scsi_cmd_to_rq(), which was introduced by kernel commit 51f3a4788928 that adds the scsi_cmd_to_rq() function.
